title: Ian Watkin
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Ian Watkin''' (25 January, 1940 - 18 May, 2016) was an actor who was chosen to play the character [[COO-2180/Legends|COO-2180]] in [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].

==Behind the scenes==
Originally, the COO-2180 was going to be a Human played by actor [[Ian Watkin]]. However, [[George Lucas]] reconsidered and made it a droid, to better fit along with the "Star Wars" type universe.
